verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — interaction term requested but no loadable constructed interaction variable is defined. The generic panel_fe runner would otherwise grade a main-effect coefficient instead of the pre-registered interaction estimand. Add a treatment or decomposition variable with transformation/source/name marking the interaction, or use a bespoke replication script.
verdict_reason: interaction term requested but no loadable constructed interaction variable is defined. The generic panel_fe runner would otherwise grade a main-effect coefficient instead of the pre-registered interaction estimand. Add a treatment or decomposition variable with transformation/source/name marking the interaction, or use a bespoke replication script.
falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) the panel-FE coefficient on incumbent subsidy is not positive and significant at p<0.05 on concentration change, OR (b) the coefficient on incumbent subsidy is not negative and significant at p<0.05 on TFP growth, OR (c) the implied 1-pp subsidy effect on top-4 concentration is below 0.25 pp. A developmentalist reading wins if subsidies to incumbents are positively associated with TFP growth (suggesting learning-by-doing and scale economies dominate rent-seeking) or if the concentration effect is negative (subsidies enable entry against foreign incumbents).
